findings.summary: No official allergen matrix found after all four searches.

summary: Confirmed Cactus Cantina at 3300 Wisconsin Avenue NW. Official pickup catalog enumerated; alcohol, modifiers, duplicates, and item-link artifacts excluded. Official allergen matrix accurately unavailable.
coordinatorNotes: Research-only isolated proposal; no APPLY or closeout.
